title: Washington's Farewell Address
description: A Wikisource source card for Washington's Farewell Address and older-student civics reading.

pages.text: Washington's Farewell Address is a primary source for studying political parties, foreign alliances, national unity, and early U.S. civic ideals.
Use this source for close reading of argument, vocabulary, historical context, and comparing advice from the founding era with later debates.
Wikisource hosts public-domain and freely licensed texts. Check the linked page for source notes, edition information, and license details before mirroring.
